user.title: Axium Amplifier
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Axium amplifier. Commands are sent over Ethernet to TCP port 17037. All of the amplifier's zones are added automatically; you can rename them afterwards.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host and port (Axium uses TCP 17037).
error.no_amplifier: Connected, but no Axium amplifier responded at this address. Check that this is an Axium device and that it is powered on.

init.title: Axium Amplifier
init.description: Manage zone names and zone groups.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Edit the zones and their names.

data_description.zones: Comma-separated list of zones as number=Name, e.g. 1=Kitchen, 2=Living room, 3=Bedroom.

add_group.title: Add zone group
add_group.description: Create a group that controls several zones together.

error.invalid_zones: Use a comma-separated list like 1=Kitchen, 2=Living room. Zone numbers must be unique and between 0 and 95.
error.invalid_group_name: Enter a name for the group.
error.duplicate_group: A group with that name already exists.
error.no_group_zones: Select at least one zone for the group.
